role: Four-marker APC/mregDC panel used for IF and patient-level marker-score support.
scoring_note: Average/z-score module score where transcriptomic; IF uses image-based positivity.

role: Minimal transcript-defined mature migratory DC state.
scoring_note: Used conceptually; not sufficient alone to define TLS identity.

role: Mature, migratory, immunoregulatory mregDC program used in multi-sample spatial analyses.
scoring_note: Scored as available-gene module; AP/MHC-II genes are kept as a separate program to avoid circularity.
Scored using available chemokines in each dataset.

role: Canonical 29-gene TLS imprint used for patient-level and availability audit.
scoring_note: Dataset scoring used the expression-overlap subset; spatial broad-validation scripts used the 28-gene overlap subset where IGLC1/PTLP were unavailable or not retained.

role: Expression-overlap TLS imprint used by the broad multi-sample spatial scoring script.
scoring_note: Kept separate from the patient-level 29-gene imprint because the broad spatial matrices used an available-gene overlap version.

role: Antigen-presentation/MHC-II proxy layer; exact HLA-DRA evidence is assigned to IF when absent from public spatial panels.
scoring_note: Scored with dataset-specific available genes; Xenium/scFFPE analyses used proxy genes where exact HLA genes were absent.

role: Interferon-associated program used for spatial gradients and adjusted specificity analyses.

scoring_note: Used to support TLS-field interpretation, not as a stand-alone TLS definition.

Transcriptomic support only; histological TLS maturation requires protein-level markers.
